purpose: Explicit evidence map for PDF 2.0 Annex A content-stream operators. This keeps operator matrix rows from passing the audit through broad text search alone.

atomicEvidence.fixture: single authoritative content stream containing every Annex A operator
atomicEvidence.covers: operator-specific operands in an executable content stream
